Class TranslationUtils

java.lang.Object
CaetanoSoft.Utilities.Translation.TranslationUtils
public class TranslationUtils extends Object
This class manages the translation of the Java AWT/Swing UI widgets like the dialogues for Color Chooser and Load and Save.

For now, only the Portuguese language is supported.
Since:
1.00
Version:
1.02.0001, 2022-07-26
Author:
José Caetano Silva

    • translateLanguage

      public static boolean translateLanguage(String strLang)
      Translate the Java resources strings to a diferent language.

      Supported language codes (BCP 47 tag format):
      • en: English
      • en_GB / en-GB: English (Great Britain)
      • en_US / en-US: English (United States of America)
      • pt: Portuguese
      • pt_PT / pt-PT: Portuguese (Portugal)
      • pt_BR / pt-BR: Portuguese (Brasil)
      Parameters:
      strLang - string to be translated
      Returns:
      true, if translation was made. false, otherwise.
      Since:
      1.00
